title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Air India Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Air India Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
